property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;c:\Users\Dell\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\Dell\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Cloudflare\Cloudflare WARP\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\Dell\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Dell\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\Dell\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\apache-maven-3.9.16\bin;;.

testcase.name: testWrongLeaveDeductionWithOptimistic5Threads

failure.message: Remaining leave days mismatch ==> expected: <2> but was: <6>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Remaining leave days mismatch ==> expected: <2> but was: <6> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:150) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:563) at WrongLeaveDeductionTest.testWrongLeaveDeductionWithOptimistic5Threads(WrongLeaveDeductionTest.java:188) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)

testcase.name: testWrongLeaveDeductionWithTwoThreads
testcase.system-out: ====================================== TEST: Detect Wrong Leave Deduction With Two Threads Employee ID: E001 Leave type: ANNUAL Initial remaining leave days: 12 Deduct days per thread: 3 Threads started: 2 Successful threads: 2 / 2 Expected remaining leave days: 6 Actual remaining leave days: 6 Expected used leave days: 6 Actual used leave days: 6 Final version: 2 Wrong deduction detected: false Result: PASSED ======================================

testcase.name: testDeductMoreThanAvailable
testcase.system-out: ====================================== TEST: Deduct More Than Available Employee ID: E001 Initial leave balance: 12 Requested leave days: 15 Deduction success: false Remaining leave days: 12 Used leave days: 0 Result: PASSED ======================================

testcase.name: testDeductAllRemainingLeave
testcase.system-out: ====================================== TEST: Deduct All Remaining Leave Employee ID: E001 Initial leave balance: 12 Requested leave days: 12 Deduction success: true Remaining leave days: 0 Used leave days: 12 Result: PASSED ======================================

testcase.name: testCorrectSingleLeaveDeduction
testcase.system-out: ====================================== TEST: Correct Single Leave Deduction Employee ID: E001 Leave type: ANNUAL Old leave balance: 12 Leave days requested: 2 Deduction success: true Expected remaining leave days: 10 Actual remaining leave days: 10 Expected used leave days: 2 Actual used leave days: 2 Wrong deduction detected: false Result: PASSED ======================================

testcase.name: testCalculateExpectedLeaveBalance
testcase.system-out: ====================================== TEST: Calculate Expected Leave Balance Old leave balance: 15 Leave days requested: 5 Expected remaining leave days: 10 Actual remaining leave days: 10 Wrong deduction detected: false Result: PASSED ======================================

testcase.name: testEmployeeNotFound
testcase.system-out: ====================================== TEST: Employee Not Found Employee ID: E999 Deduction success: false Employee exists: false Result: PASSED ======================================
